title: bertya polymorpha var. genuina
intro: Bertya polymorpha var. genuina, also known as the "Genuina Bertya" or "Coastal Bertya", is a variety of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bertya polymorpha var. genuina include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and can also be used in the form of tinctures or extracts for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
